measurements.name: tui_panel_switch
measurements.description: Synthetic TUI key-event-to-frame panel switch latency.
measurements.synthetic_caveat: Measures in-process state-machine transition against a 144-byte mock frame only; does not exercise the ratatui buffer-diff or crossterm write path. Will not catch regressions in the real render pipeline. Real-load TUI bench (terminal-emulator integration) is deferred to v1.1+ (see spec §12.1). Retained as a smoke-test regression detector for in-process render logic.

details.fixture: synthetic in-process key event to frame render

measurements.name: tui_detail_modal_open
measurements.description: Synthetic memory detail modal open round-trip.
measurements.synthetic_caveat: Measures in-process state-machine transition against a 251-byte mock frame with an in-memory daemon fixture; does not exercise the ratatui buffer-diff, crossterm write path, or live daemon socket round-trip. Will not catch regressions in the real render pipeline. Real-load TUI bench (terminal-emulator integration) is deferred to v1.1+ (see spec §12.1). Retained as a smoke-test regression detector for in-process render logic.

details.fixture: synthetic trust artifact fetch from in-memory daemon fixture
